title: [lichen_l2] net_pkt leak on lichen_link_rx buffer overflow check
description:
Cross-file resource ownership bug: In lichen_l2_input(), if lichen_link_rx() returns success but ipv6_len > sizeof(rx_ipv6_buf), the code returns early without freeing any net_pkt.

Wait - actually at this point in the code (lines 1174-1180), no net_pkt has been allocated yet. The allocation happens at lines 1205-1208, AFTER the ipv6_len validation.

So this is NOT a leak. The function correctly validates ipv6_len before allocating the net_pkt.

Closing as not-a-bug.
